source: # Manual-import seed for Tanzania fertilizer consumption (region × year × nutrient).
# WHY THIS FILE EXISTS:
#   Tanzania NBS publishes the Annual Agricultural Sample Survey (AASS) and the
#   National Sample Census of Agriculture (NSCA) — both as PDFs only. Tanzania
#   IS covered by VIFAA retail prices in our existing pull (source =
#   africafertilizer in fertilizer_price)

source: #   not. See ../canonical/AFRICA_DATA_SOURCES.md for the full audit.
# HOW TO POPULATE:
#   1. Pull the latest AASS Key Findings Report. Recent:
#        https://www.nbs.go.tz/uploads/statistics/documents/en-1760643333-KEY%20FINDINGS%20REPORT_AASS%202023-24_ENGLISH.pdf
#        https://www.nbs.go.tz/uploads/statistics/documents/en-1734966261-AASS%202022-23%20KEY%20FINDINGS%20REPORT-ENGLISH.pdf
#      Index of AASS reports: https://www.nbs.go.tz/statistics/topic/annual-agriculture-sample-surveys
#   2. Locate the "Area Applied with Fertilizer" or "Fertilizer Use" table.
#      AASS reports break out by region (~26 regions in Mainland + Zanzibar).
#      Coverage: total area planted vs area applied with fertilizer; type of
#      fertilizer (Urea/DAP/CAN/NPK); sometimes nutrient tonnes.
#   3. For nutrient TONNES (preferred): emit one row per (region
#   4. For COVERAGE % only (no tonnes): land as `nutrient='total'` with
#      `kg_per_ha_arable` populated using the report's area-applied-with-fert
#      metric × inferred application rate. Flag in review_flags as
#      'coverage_only_no_tonnes'.
#   5. Commit with the source PDF URL in the commit message.
# SCHEMA (canonical fertilizer_use):
#   source            = 'manual_import_tza_aass'
#   source_record_id  = composite
#   country_iso3      = 'TZA'
#   country_name      = 'Tanzania'
#   state_or_region   = region name (e.g. 'Arusha'
#   year              = start year of agricultural-year (e.g. '2023' for 2023/24)
#   nutrient          = 'N' | 'P2O5' | 'K2O' | 'total'
#   total_tonnes      = consumption in metric tonnes; NULL if AASS reports only coverage %
#   kg_per_ha_arable  = consumption in kg/ha arable; NULL if only tonnes
#   arable_land_ha    = denominator used if kg_per_ha_arable populated
#   source_url        = direct URL to the AASS Key Findings PDF
#   retrieved_at      = ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of extraction
#   review_flags      = always 'manual_import'; add 'AASS_2023_24'
# CURRENT STATE: header-only. Awaiting first analyst extraction.
